# VSCode Shadertoy Sound

- Repo: `https://github.com/hatoo/vscode-shadertoy-sound`
- Local checkout: `references\vscode-shadertoy-sound`
- Status: included for deeper follow-up

Why it is relevant now:

- The project is explicitly focused on running **Shadertoy sound shaders** inside VS Code.
- Its scope is narrow but directly aligned with GPU/audio shader playback.
- It is likely a useful comparison point for editor integration, preview UX, and sound-player UI design.

This placeholder should later capture the sound shader entry contract, runtime backend, player UI wiring, and any limits relative to native Shadertoy.
